title: Harden manager auth/session success contract for mobile runtime
description: Align backend auth/login, auth/refresh, and auth/me success metadata for manager clients so mobile can render deterministic session UX without relying on dev-first assumptions or ambiguous payload fields.
acceptance_criteria: Login, refresh, and me flows expose deterministic auth-session-v1 metadata for manager runtime
Success payloads provide stable role and subject identity fields required by mobile session restore
Auth session API tests cover contract stability for manager success and guardrail paths
